creatingAccountAgreement: Creating an account, you agree to our
termsFooterNote: By tapping "I Agree", you confirm that you have read and understood these Terms & Conditions.
termsSection1Body: By creating an account and using Flowers App, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
termsSection2Body: We collect and use your personal data as described in our Privacy Policy. Your data is stored securely and will not be shared with third parties without your consent.
termsSection3Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree not to share your account with others or use it for unauthorized purposes.
termsSection4Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
forgetPasswordSubtitle: Please enter your email associated to your account
verificationCodeSentToYourEmail: Verification code sent to your email
emailVerificationSubtitle: Please enter your code that sent to your email address
resetPasswordSubtitle: Password must not be empty and must contain 6 characters with upper case letter and one number at least
connectionTimeout: Connection timed out. Please check your internet and try again.
sendTimeout: Request timed out while sending data. Please try again.
receiveTimeout: Server took too long to respond. Please try again.
noInternetConnection: No internet connection. Please check your network.
unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
invalidRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
authFailed: Authentication failed. Please log in again.
forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
notFound: The requested resource was not found.
serverError: Our servers are currently experiencing issues. Please try again later.
defaultErrorTryAgain: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again.
unexpectedErrorTryAgain: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
userAlreadyExists: This account already exists. Please try logging in or use a different email/phone.
invalidPhoneFormat: Invalid phone number format. Please check and try again.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

passwordSpecialCharacter: Password must contain at least 1 special character
usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
usernameInvalid: Only letters, numbers and underscore allowed
phoneMustStartWithCountryCode: Phone must start with country code (e.g. +20)
